responsibilities: Built a sales admin dashboard for a startup tailored to their operational needs, including a public-facing page, POS-style sales entry, and profit/revenue analytics.
Developed a Telegram bot connected to the same backend, allowing clients to view sales summaries and key metrics directly from Telegram without opening the dashboard.
Engineered the backend of an EdTech platform including video processing pipeline, lesson progress tracking, and API integrations with a public landing page, deployed on AWS using Docker.
Maintained both systems in active production across Linux/Apache environments with structured deployment and clean, maintainable codebases.
Delivered 3 websites — 2 for production and 1 dedicated to feature testing — covering a public-facing landing page with product pricing, SEO optimization, and admin-controlled content management.

Built an internal admin dashboard that replaced a manual spreadsheet workflow, reducing data entry from 11 fields to 2 by auto-calculating — an 82% reduction — saving admin time and eliminating input errors.
Centralized business data into a single system shared across all admins, with structured backup replacing scattered spreadsheet files. (PHP, JavaScript, AWS EC2, RDS, MySQL)
Completed two tracks of work each week: independently designing new page layouts with creative freedom, and separately converting Figma designs into pixel-accurate frontend using CSS and JavaScript.
Built all pages on WordPress, worked in a team of 4, and presented progress to senior developers every Monday and Friday, incorporating feedback and iterating each cycle.
Supported enterprise network operations; assisted in configuration of routers, switches, and modems.
Maintained network documentation and device configuration records for 50+ systems.
Learned network security procedures, infrastructure monitoring, and uptime management.
Oversaw store inventory and stock levels, ensuring optimal levels for operational efficiency.
Created and maintained detailed daily reports, securely stored in digital format for easy access and reference.
